text.title: Vercel Deployment Discipline Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Vercel Deployment Discipline end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: env-audit
step.action: Run env-audit.sh against current env vars; flag cross-scope leaks.

step.name: runtime-check
step.action: Diff each `export const runtime='edge'` against runtime-allow-list.yaml.

step.name: rollback-plan
step.action: Compose rollback playbook with verify URL.
